body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
As we work on the performance section of the upcoming land model paper, it would be good to have more information about the performance of the full land model (soil + canopy + snow). To that end, this PR adds a snowy land benchmark run.

The run is largely copied from the snowy land longrun, with the simulation length shortened, diagnostics removed, and profiling added.

title: add snowy land benchmark
